---
output:
  github_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# Karlsson2013inR

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

This package implements the algorithms in Karlsson (2013) in R.

Karlsson, S. (2013). Forecasting with Bayesian Vector Autoregression. In: Elliott, G. and Timmerman, A. (eds) *Handbook of Economic Forecasting*. Elsevier B.V. Vol 2, Part B., pp. 791-897.

## Installation

```{r, eval=FALSE}
remotes::install_github("markjwbecker/Karlsson2013inR", force = TRUE, upgrade = "never")
```
